column1: # DVAR(database, field, criteria): SAMPLE variance (n-1) of the field over
# matching records; not enough numbers (n<=1) is #DIV/0!.
# All-records Yield = {14,10,9,10,8}: mean 10.2; Sum sq dev 20.8; var_s = 20.8/4 = 5.2.
# Apple Yield = {14,10}: mean 12; Sum sq dev 8; var_s = 8/1 = 8.
# Pear Yield = {10,8}: mean 9; Sum sq dev 2; var_s = 2/1 = 2.
# Single matching record -> n=1 -> sample variance is #DIV/0!.
